data.title: NIST Allocates Over $3 Million to Small Businesses Advancing AI, Biotechnology, Semiconductors, Quantum and More
data.summary: NIST is allocating funding to eight small businesses in seven states under the Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) program.

data.title: NIST Issues Broad Agency Announcement for Proposals to Advance Microelectronics Technologies
data.summary: The CHIPS for America funding opportunity will support critical research, prototyping and commercial solutions that advance microelectronics technology in the United States.

data.title: In Quantum Sensing, What Beats Beating Noise? Meeting Noise Halfway.
data.summary: A team including scientists at NIST may have found a new way of dealing with noise at the microscopic scales where quantum physics reigns.

data.title: NIST and Partners Use Quantum Mechanics to Make a Factory for Random Numbers
data.summary: Broadcast as a free public service, the beacon can be used anywhere an independent source of random numbers would be useful, such as selecting jury candidates or assigning resources through a lottery.
